title: Thousands of Afghans displaced by conflict with Pakistan
author: FRANCE24
fullText:
To display this content from YouTube, you must enable advertisement tracking and audience measurement.

 © France 24 
 
01:31
summary: More than 8,000 Afghans have been forced from their homes by fighting with Pakistani forces along the border in recent days, the Taliban government said Tuesday. The neighbours have clashed along the frontier since Thursday, when Afghanistan launched a border offensive in retaliation for Pakistani air strikes.
